thinking_ladder.posture: Plan briefly, act on the strongest hypothesis.
The obvious fix failed once — re-derive the failure from evidence before editing.
Two identical failures — your model of the problem is wrong. Enumerate at least three distinct hypotheses and test the most falsifiable one.
Last chance before the loop blocks. Step back to first principles, question your assumptions about the mission, and consider whether it needs operator input.

continuation.summary: Prompt 16 creation hardening passes independent security and critic review. This iteration strengthened the regression test so direct INSERT cannot return through either missing explicit revocation or GRANT ALL. Teammates security_review, gate_runner, and independent_critic verified the implementation and gates. RUNBOOK, BLUEPRINT, and roadmap were intentionally not updated because audit:check did not exit 0; minimum iteration 3 also prevents a done claim now.
